summary: node-app-doctor exfiltrates host system information to hardcoded external endpoint
details: The package's collect.js gathers host data using os.hostname(), os.homedir(), filesystem probes (fs.existsSync), and child_process execution, then issues an HTTP POST to the hardcoded endpoint http://aab.sportsontheweb.net. The destination domain is unrelated to any documented npm publisher infrastructure and the data flow is one-way reconnaissance from the installer's machine to an external host. Installing or loading this module causes installer host identifiers and filesystem probe results to be transmitted to an attacker-controlled destination over cleartext HTTP.

cwes.description: The product contains code that appears to be malicious in nature.
cwes.name: Embedded Malicious Code
